message:
🌱 Add oras: `oras cp` fails if `org.opencontainers.image.ref.name` mission (#968)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oras-1505-oras-cp-fails-if-org-opencontainers-image-ref-name-contains-a-full-ref",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oras: `oras cp` fails if `org.opencontainers.image.ref.name` contains a full reference",
+    "description": "`oras cp` fails if `org.opencontainers.image.ref.name` contains a full reference. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify oras troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your oras deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras -n oras --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oras configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oras configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nkubectl get configmap -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oras\n```\n### What happened in your environment?\n\nWe use OCI images to package eBPF programs in [Inspektor Gadget](https://github.com/inspektor-gadget/inspektor-gadget/)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for `oras cp` fails if `org.opencontainers.image.ref.name`…",
+        "description": "The oci-layout can't be used when the image reference contains a slash ( see issue 1505). This PR introduces a new oci-layout-path that explicitly receives the path of the oci layout fixing the parsing ambiguity.\n\n*(optional, in `fixes #<issue number>(, fixes #<issue_number>, ...)` format, will\n```yaml\n$ oras cp --from-oci-layout ./mygadget.tar.folder:ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/mygadget:latest localhost:5000/foo:latest --debug\nError: invalid argument \"./mygadget.tar.folder:ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/mygadget:latest\": failed to find path \"./mygadget.tar.folder:ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/mygadget\": stat ./mygadget.tar.folder:ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/mygadget: no such file or directory\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm `oras cp` fails if `org.opencontainers.image.ref.n… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras -n oras --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n oras --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The oci-layout can't be used when the image reference contains a slash ( see issue 1505). This PR introduces a new oci-layout-path that explicitly receives the path of the oci layout fixing the parsing ambiguity.\n\n*(optional, in `fixes #<issue number>(, fixes #<issue_number>, ...)` format, will close the issue(s) when PR gets merged)*:\n- [X]  Does the affected code have corresponding tests, e.g.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ oras cp --from-oci-layout ./mygadget.tar.folder:ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/mygadget:latest localhost:5000/foo:latest --debug\nError: invalid argument \"./mygadget.tar.folder:ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/mygadget:latest\": failed to find path \"./mygadget.tar.folder:ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/mygadget\": stat ./mygadget.tar.folder:ghcr.io/inspektor-gadget/gadget/mygadget: no such file or directory",
+        "{\n    \"schemaVersion\": 2,\n    \"manifests\": [\n        {\n            \"mediaType\": \"application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json\",\n            \"digest\": \"sha256:69fb10d45f448525a39bb26ae2af71e57fe2b7aa774547eb57da38ddf08b12e0\",\n            \"size\": 1278,\n            \"annotations\": {\n                \"org.opencontainers.image.created\": \"2024-09-19T13:06:53-05:00\",\n                \"org.opencontainers.image.description\": \"TODO: Fill the gadget description\",\n                \"org.opencontainers.image.documentation\": \"TODO: Fill the gadget documentation URL\",\n                \"org.opencontainers.image.source\": \"TODO: Fill the gadget source code URL\",\n                \"org.opencontainers.image.title\": \"TODO: Fill the gadget name\",\n                \"org.opencontainers.image.url\": \"TODO: Fill the gadget home",
+        "@FeynmanZhou Here's the difference.\n\nOriginal:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "oras",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/oras-project/oras/issues/1505",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/oras-project/oras/pull/1507"
+    },

+  },

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with oras installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:43:08.011Z",
